name: Stuffed Beef Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, egg, bread crumbs, and salt using a fork.
2. Divide the mixture into 8 equal portions.
3. Cut the cheese into eight sticks measuring 5 inches long by 1/2 inch wide.
4. Shape one portion of meat into an oval measuring 6 inches long by 3 inches wide.
5. Place a cheese stick in the center of the oval.
6. Roll up the meat oval to form a hot dog shape, enclosing the cheese inside.
7. Press the ends together to seal.
8. Repeat steps 4-7 for all portions.
9. Preheat the broiler.
10. Place the beef dogs on a broiler pan and broil until browned, turning them occasionally for even cooking.
11. Serve in hot dog buns with ketchup and relish. Serves 8.
